questions.question: What are the six runtime shapes the lesson lists?
questions.questionZh: 课程中列出的六个运行时形状 (runtime shapes) 是什么？
options: Request-response, streaming, durable execution, queue-based, event-driven, scheduled
Read, write, exec, fork, exit, wait
REST, gRPC, GraphQL, WebSocket, SSE, MQTT
Map, filter, reduce, fold, scan, group
optionsZh: 请求-响应（Request-Response）、流式（Streaming）、持久化执行（Durable Execution）、基于队列（Queue-based）、事件驱动（Event-driven）、定时调度（Scheduled）
读取 (Read)、写入 (Write)、执行 (Exec)、派生 (Fork)、退出 (Exit)、等待 (Wait)
表述性状态转移 (REST)、gRPC (gRPC)、GraphQL (GraphQL)、WebSocket (WebSocket)、服务器发送事件 (SSE)、消息队列遥测传输 (MQTT)
映射 (Map)、过滤 (Filter)、归约 (Reduce)、折叠 (Fold)、扫描 (Scan)、分组 (Group)
questions.explanation: These are the six runtime shapes; pick a shape before picking a framework.
questions.explanationZh: 以上即为六种运行时形态 (Runtime Shapes)；在选定框架 (Framework) 之前，请先明确所需的形态。

questions.question: When is request-response a poor fit?
questions.questionZh: 在什么情况下，请求-响应（Request-Response）模式并不适用？
options: When the task takes longer than about 30 seconds and users hang up while workers pile up
optionsZh: 关于1秒分类 (Classification)
当任务耗时超过约30秒，且用户挂断，同时工作进程（workers）不断堆积时
关于 REST API
关于内部服务
questions.explanation: Synchronous HTTP is only viable for short tasks; long tasks need queue/durable/event shapes.
questions.explanationZh: 同步 HTTP (Synchronous HTTP) 仅适用于短时任务；长时任务则需要采用队列/持久化/事件驱动模式 (queue/durable/event shapes)。

questions.question: What is durable execution's core property?
questions.questionZh: 持久化执行（Durable Execution）的核心特性是什么？
options: State is checkpointed after every step so the runtime can resume from the last successful step on failure
optionsZh: 更快的推理 (Inference)
每个步骤完成后都会保存状态检查点（checkpoint），以便运行时（runtime）在发生故障时能够从最后一个成功的步骤恢复。
降低 Token 成本
原生语音支持 (Native voice support)
questions.explanation: Checkpoint-and-resume is the differentiator; LangGraph is the lesson's reference.
questions.explanationZh: 检查点与恢复（Checkpoint-and-resume）是其核心差异点；LangGraph 则是本课程的参考框架。

questions.question: Which Anthropic observation justifies queue-based runtimes for long-horizon agents?
questions.questionZh: Anthropic 的哪一项观察结论为长程智能体（long-horizon agents）采用基于队列的运行时（queue-based runtimes）提供了依据？
options: Computer use announcement: dozens-to-hundreds of steps per task is normal
optionsZh: 任务 (Tasks) 始终在 5 秒内完成
计算机使用（Computer Use）公告：每项任务执行数十至数百个步骤属于正常现象
任务必须同步执行。
Cron 能解决一切问题
questions.explanation: Anthropic flagged dozens-to-hundreds of steps per task as normal; that workload needs queues or durable runtimes.
questions.explanationZh: Anthropic 将每个任务包含几十到上百个步骤视为正常情况；此类工作负载（workload）需要队列（queues）或持久化运行时（durable runtimes）的支持。

questions.question: What does the lesson mean by 'observability is load-bearing'?
questions.questionZh: 课程中提到的“可观测性（Observability）是关键支撑”具体是什么意思？
options: Without OTel GenAI spans and a Langfuse/Phoenix/Opik backend you cannot debug a multi-step agent that failed at step 40
optionsZh: 日志 (Logs) 格式美观
若缺少 OTel GenAI 跨度 (spans) 与 Langfuse/Phoenix/Opik 后端 (backend)，你将无法调试在第 40 步发生故障的多步智能体 (multi-step agent)。
磁盘已满
提供商需要此项信息用于计费。
questions.explanation: Observability is not optional for multi-step agents; it is the difference between debugging and replaying from scratch.
questions.explanationZh: 对于多步智能体（Multi-step Agents）而言，可观测性（Observability）并非可选项；它决定了你是在进行调试（Debugging），还是只能从头重放（Replaying from scratch）。

questions.question: Why must queue workers have a dead-letter queue (DLQ)?
questions.questionZh: 为什么队列工作进程（Queue Workers）必须配备死信队列（Dead-Letter Queue, DLQ）？
options: Without DLQ, failed jobs vanish silently
optionsZh: 若未配置死信队列（Dead Letter Queue），失败的任务将悄无声息地消失。
AWS 要求使用死信队列（Dead Letter Queue, DLQ）
死信队列 (Dead Letter Queue) 可加快任务执行速度
死信队列 (DLQ) 已加密
questions.explanation: Failed jobs without DLQ disappear; DLQ is the parking lot for failed jobs.
questions.explanationZh: 若未配置死信队列 (Dead Letter Queue, DLQ)，失败的任务将会直接消失；死信队列 (DLQ) 相当于失败任务的“停车场”。

questions.question: What does the lesson recommend pairing cron-shaped agents with?
questions.questionZh: 课程建议将定时型智能体（cron-shaped agents）与什么搭配使用？
options: Durable execution so a failing nightly run resumes next tick
optionsZh: GPU自动扩缩器 (GPU Autoscalers)
支持持久化执行（Durable Execution），使失败的夜间任务（Nightly Run）可在下一个调度周期（Tick）自动恢复。
流式 SSE (Server-Sent Events)
WebRTC
questions.explanation: Cron + durable execution recovers cleanly from failed scheduled runs.
questions.explanationZh: Cron 调度与持久化执行 (Durable Execution) 相结合，可在定时任务执行失败时实现优雅恢复。
